calendar.matters:
Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Withdraw Bond And For Exoneration Of Surety
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE THORPE's Motion for Wthdrawal of Bond And For Exoneration Of Surety.

Plaintiff Lawrence Thorpe's motion to withdraw bond and for exoneration of surety is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Withdrawal Of Bond And Exoneration Of Surety
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE THORPE's Motion For Withdrawal Of Bond And Exoneration Of Surety.

Plaintiff Lawrence Thorpe's motion for withdrawal of bond and exoneration of surety is denied without prejudice to being refiled. No proof of service filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
